Guns'n'Glory: Frontier Defense

Deploy and reposition mobile bandit units along paths to ambush waves of pioneer enemies. Stop settlers and stagecoaches from escaping by strategically placing units within their attack range. Earn gold from defeated enemies to recruit new unit types and upgrade damage or range. Complete levels across different regions as enemy waves grow stronger. Don't let more than 10 enemies escape!

Controls: Arrow Keys: Move selected unit or navigate menu | Space: Select/confirm unit or menu action | Shift: Cancel selection or close menu | Z: Open upgrade/recruit menu | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/unpause | R: Restart
